creator: ahd@kew.com
text:
The FreeBSD installation prompts for registration information, and allows saving this
	information if a network connection is not immediately available.  However, the
	generated file is devoid of instructions (in particular the e-mail address to send the
	registration to) and thus unless the installer writes down the address, the registration
	is likely to be discarded.

Fix: 

Include e-mail address in the generated output file with suitable comment on how to mail
	it.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Install FreeBSD and use the registration option with no network connection.
